itemReviewed.name: The Emerald Heights International School - Indore
The Emerald Heights International School - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody: Being at Emerald Heights allowed me to bring my dreams to life. Currently, I am in Class 12, aspiring to apply as an international student abroad. My experience working with the career counseling department at Emerald Heights International School was truly transformative. It guided me from a state of confusion to a clear understanding of my career aspirations.  The journey was a blend of self-discovery and learning, as I navigated the complexities of the abroad education system with the support of wonderful counselors. This journey has been incredible, and now, equipped with the knowledge and confidence I’ve gained, I’m ready to apply to my dream college and embrace the opportunity with determination.

itemReviewed.name: The Emerald Heights International School - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Living for 4 years at Emerald Heights, I can confidently call it my second home. When I first joined, the huge campus overwhelmed me, and I had no idea what I wanted to do in life, no clear vision of my future. Now that I look back, the environment, guidance, and opportunities I see how this school has impacted me and shaped my career.

One of things I value the most is personalized career counseling. With countless conversations with our counselors (Vandana Ma’am, Kanishka Ma’am & Sunita Ma’am), helped me find clarity and gave me confidence to apply to universities that aligned with my passions.

Emerald Heights isn’t just about academics — it’s about discovering who you are. Participating in Robotics Nationals, MUNs, Drama competitions, Hackathons, and Workshops gave me the courage to step out of my comfort zone. These experiences ignited passions I didn’t know I had and taught me that learning can be exciting and fun.

Being a boarder made my journey even more special. It was hard at first, but the friendships I made, the late-night talks, and the sense of belonging made it feel like family. Living here taught me independence, patience, and how to find joy in little moments.

Emerald Heights didn’t just shape my future; it shaped me. I walked in uncertain and overwhelmed, and now I’m in 12th class going to leave with a purpose, friendships, and amazing memories I’ll cherish forever.

Nikunj Menghani (EHIS 25’)

itemReviewed.name: The Emerald Heights International School - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody: Emerald Heights International School impresses with its outstanding infrastructure and dedicated faculty. The modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, and extensive library create a stimulating learning environment. The teachers are not only knowledgeable but also passionate about fostering student engagement and critical thinking. The Career Counselling Department is particularly exceptional, offering personalized guidance and resources that empower students to navigate their futures confidently. With workshops on resume building and college applications, they ensure every student is well-prepared for the next steps. Overall, Emerald Heights provides a holistic educational experience that equips students for success in a rapidly changing world.

itemReviewed.name: The Emerald Heights International School - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody: My experience at Emerald Heights International School was really positive. The career counseling cell was a huge help in guiding me through my academic choices, and the counselors were always approachable and genuinely invested in my future. The sports facilities are fantastic, giving me plenty of chances to stay active and try out different activities. Living on campus felt comfortable and homely, with everything well taken care of. The only challenge was the pretty intense schedule for boarders—it’s definitely a lot to manage, but it taught me how to balance my time. Overall, it’s been a great place for personal growth.
